backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Project and Inquiry types with admin-only CRUD operations for a single project, public inquiry submission, and query methods for filtering projects by city or pincode.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: a CTA button in HeroBanner linking to plots99.com and a plots99.com link added to the Footer contact section.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend component files describing their UI structure, functionality, and recent updates including acreage corrections and plots99.com integration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, defining a premium design system with elite-gold and elite-red accents.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Elite City Real Estate App with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering Header, HomePage main content, Footer, and Toaster in a full-height flex layout.
frontend/src/components/Amenities.tsx: Displays 14 amenities in a responsive grid with icons, images, and descriptions including roads, utilities, pool, parks, and sports facilities with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Approvals.tsx: Shows DTCP and RERA approval status for three projects with checkmark/clock icons, plus a zoomable DTCP layout plan image in a dialog.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer with company info, project links showing correct acreage, contact details including phone 9848525246 and plots99.com listing link, plus Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component displaying the Elite India Projects logo, company name, contact phone number with call-to-action button, and DTCP/RERA certification badges.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Hero banner section with background image, promotional text for Elite City Kalvakurthi, call-to-action buttons for booking and viewing listings, and a zoomable marketing poster dialog showcasing all three projects.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Contact form component for plot booking inquiries with fields for name, phone, email, project selection, and message; includes form validation and submission handling with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/LayoutGallery.ts: Gallery component displaying the DTCP-approved layout plan for Elite City Kalvakurthi with zoom functionality in a dialog modal and key project statistics cards.
frontend/src/components/LocationConnecti: Section showcasing location advantages including connectivity to four major highways (Raichur, Kodad, Hyderabad, Chennai) and proximity to key landmarks like railway stations, schools, hospitals, and employment centers.
frontend/src/components/PricingDetails.t: Pricing grid displaying per-square-yard rates for five different plot offerings across Elite Township, Elite City phases, and commercial plots, with featured project highlighting.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetails.t: Overview section presenting key project specifications including total acreage (39 acres), plot counts (633 plots), plot size ranges (146-330 sq yards), and HMDA approval status across all Elite India Projects ventures.
Displays a grid of three real estate projects (Elite Township, Elite City, Elite City Premium) with images, locations, and area details. Features hover effects and a featured badge for Elite City.
frontend/src/components/VideoGallery.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of six video cards showcasing project tours and amenities. Includes play/pause controls and hover effects with custom video player UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP login/logout functionality. Manages AuthClient lifecycle, identity state, and login status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query mutation hook for submitting inquiry form data to the backend actor. Invalidates inquiry queries on successful submission.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space. Includes elite-gold and elite-red brand colors with utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page component that composes all major sections including hero banner, project showcase, amenities, gallery, pricing, and inquiry form.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions for colors (using OKLCH), container settings, animations, and brand-specific elite-gold/elite-red color tokens.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a real estate showcase application for Elite India Projects Private Limited, featuring Elite City Kalvakurthi and other ventures with detailed amenities, approvals, and contact information. Contains 14 existing features including company branding, project showcases, amenities sections, location details, contact forms, and media galleries with DTCP layouts and videos.
